name: ai-vtuber-controller
description: Local-first MVP monorepo for AI VTuber controller, OBS overlay, and future VTube Studio integration.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n OVERLAY,CONTROLLER -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @vtuber/overlay" "npm run dev --workspace @vtuber/controller"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @vtuber/shared && npm run build --workspace @vtuber/controller && npm run build --workspace @vtuber/overlay
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @vtuber/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @vtuber/controller && npm run typecheck --workspace @vtuber/overlay
